steps.title: Find the constant c
steps.content: Since $p$ has slope 7, write $p(x) = 7x + b$. Use $p(3) = 23$: $$7(3) + b = 23 \Rightarrow b = 2$$ So $p(x) = 7x + 2$. Now solve $p(c) = -5$: $$7c + 2 = -5 \Rightarrow c = -1$$

steps.title: Find the slope of t
steps.content: Function $t$ passes through $(-1,\,-6)$ and $(4,\,34)$. Apply the slope formula: $$\frac{34-(-6)}{4-(-1)} = \frac{40}{5} = 8$$
